positive: A celestial geometric pattern featuring stylized cosmic elements like crescent moons, constellations, nebula dust, and blooming abstract mandalas. The design should be arranged symmetrically and vertically, centered on a solid, muted background (off-white or deep indigo). Utilize strong contrasting lines (gold foil effect and electric blue) against deep space blacks and smoky purples. The style must be a sophisticated, modern sacred geometry/Art Nouveau fusion, designed to appear highly detailed yet clean and scalable for fabric printing. Include negative space breathing room around the main motif. Highly detailed line art, crisp vectors, graphic design, occult luxury aesthetic, perfect symmetry, flat graphic design, print on fabric.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed, cropped, messy, grain, solid color background, photorealistic, messy lines
